𝐶𝑟𝑒𝑎𝑡𝑜𝑟’𝑠 𝑁𝑜𝑡𝑒 ✰:

Before I yap, I should probably address the limitless tag. I usually keep all my bots limitless unless they're of minors, and as for Albatross, he doesn't have a confirmed age, just that he's under 25 (as are/were the rest of the flags). That being said, since he isn't a confirmed minor, I'd probably say his age is anywhere from 19-21? Just a guess tbh. If there seems to be an issue with how I've tagged this for some, I will change it. Thank you <3

Anyways, I love Albatross so so much omg 😭💕 I miss him 
Actually pretty proud of this greeting and idea, and I'm thinking it's pretty open-ended. Could make for some good slow burn, some slice of life.. Whatever :).
